reviews.comment:
La verdad que no se para que tienen una estación de servicios si nunca tienen nafta, cuando estábamos llegando a destino paramos para cargar nafta y no tenían, x suerte llegamos a villa atamisqui con lo poco q tenía de nafta, y los baño la verdad una vergüenza, y a la vuelta también paramos a cargar nafta y tampoco tenían nafta y malisima la contestación de los empleados cuando me bajé a preguntar si tenían nafta o no

(Translated by Google)
The truth is that I don't know why they have a service station if they never have gas. When we were arriving at our destination, we stopped to fill up with gas and they didn't have any. Luckily, we arrived at Villa Atamisqui with the little gas they had, and the bathroom was a disgrace. On the way back, we also stopped to fill up with gas and they didn't have any gas either. The employees' response was terrible when I got off to ask if they had gas or not.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNE1qa2Z3EAE
